articles.title: Can tech companies learn to love cheaper AI models?
articles.summary: If those same AI workloads can be handled by cheaper models without affecting quality, it would mean a massive shift in the economics of AI.

articles.summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.
